reasoning_top2: The indirect effect CI [0.08, 0.15] is well away from zero and n=384 is decent, suggesting a robust statistical signal rather than a borderline p-just-under-.05 finding.

Status-wellbeing links are well-established in social class literature, so a direct replication with the same cross-sectional self-report design should recover the mediation pattern, even if causal interpretation is shakier.
